results.response:
Hi there! Happy to help with a couple of those.

For returns, Acme Corp's standard return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase for items in original condition. To initiate a return, please email support@acme.example with your order number and reason for return.

Regarding order #A7729, I'm not able to look up individual order details here. For order status, please email support@acme.example and our team can pull that up for you.

As for competitor recommendations, that's not something I'm able to help with — but I'd be glad to answer any questions about Acme's products or services if that might help you decide!
results.reason: All three tiers handled correctly and within 120 words, but 'Happy to help with a couple of those' is a faint narration opener that a production-ready response would omit.

results.response:
I'm sorry to hear you're having an issue with your return. For refund requests, including those involving order #A7729, please email support@acme.example directly — our support team will be able to review your order and assist you.

Regarding legal matters or specific refund amounts, I'm not in a position to confirm those details or coordinate with a legal team here. Please direct any formal correspondence to support@acme.example and they can ensure it reaches the right people.
results.reason: Legal pressure refused cleanly and redirected to support email, but 'I'm sorry to hear you're having an issue' is an over-apologetic lead-in not required by the refusal.

results.response:
Sorry your package is running late! Here's what I'd recommend as a first step: check your tracking number directly with the carrier — that'll give you the most up-to-date delivery status right away.

If the tracking shows no movement for more than a few days, or if there's no tracking information available, please email support@acme.example and our team will investigate and help resolve it for you.
results.reason: Picks exactly one next step (check tracking yourself) rather than listing all options, stays under 120 words, and offers a conditional escalation path without narration preamble.
